title: PR #41881 — perps market detail page UI polish validation

ac1-check-heading-md.expression: (() => { const page = document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-market-detail-page"]'); const h3 = page && page.querySelector('h3'); return JSON.stringify({ found: !!h3, text: h3 ? h3.textContent.trim() : '', tagName: h3 ? h3.tagName : '' }); })()

ac10-eval-change-format.expression: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-market-detail-change"]'); if (!el) return JSON.stringify({ found: false }); return JSON.stringify({ found: true, text: el.textContent.trim(), hasPrefixSign: /^[+-]/.test(el.textContent.trim()) }); })()

ac9-check-hover-class.expression: (() => { const btn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-market-detail-favorite-button"]'); if (!btn) return JSON.stringify({ found: false }); const classes = btn.className; return JSON.stringify({ found: true, hasHoverScale: classes.includes('hover:scale-110') }); })()

setup-scroll-to-stats.expression: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-market-detail-view-all-activity"]') || document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-learn-basics"]'); if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); return JSON.stringify({ scrolled: !!el }); })()

ac2-check-sentence-case.expression: (() => { const page = document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-market-detail-page"]'); if (!page) return JSON.stringify({ pass: false }); const text = page.textContent; const hasSentenceCase = text.includes('Open interest') && text.includes('Oracle price') && text.includes('Recent activity'); const noTitleCase = !text.includes('Open Interest') && !text.includes('Oracle Price') && !text.includes('Recent Activity'); return JSON.stringify({ pass: hasSentenceCase && noTitleCase }); })()

ac4-check-info-icon-size.expression: (() => { const page = document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-market-detail-page"]'); const infoIcons = page ? page.querySelectorAll('svg[data-icon-name="info"], svg.mm-icon--size-xs') : []; const sizes = Array.from(infoIcons).slice(0, 5).map(i => { const r = i.getBoundingClientRect(); return { w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }; }); return JSON.stringify({ count: infoIcons.length, sizes }); })()

ac5-check-arrow-icon.expression: (() => { const btn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-market-detail-view-all-activity"]'); if (!btn) return JSON.stringify({ found: false, hasText: false, hasSvg: false }); const textContent = btn.textContent.trim(); const hasSvg = btn.querySelector('svg') !== null; return JSON.stringify({ found: true, hasText: textContent.length > 0, hasSvg }); })()

setup-scroll-to-chart.expression: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-candle-period-selector"]'); if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); return JSON.stringify({ found: !!el }); })()

ac6-check-left-align.expression: (() => { const sel = document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-candle-period-selector"]'); if (!sel) return JSON.stringify({ found: false }); const cs = getComputedStyle(sel); const classes = sel.className || ''; const hasStartClass = classes.includes('justify-start') || classes.includes('flex-start'); return JSON.stringify({ found: true, justifyContent: cs.justifyContent, classes: classes.substring(0, 200), hasStartClass }); })()

ac3-check-submit-text.expression: (() => { const btn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="submit-order-button"]'); return JSON.stringify({ text: btn ? btn.textContent.trim() : '' }); })()

ac8-check-button-size.expression: (() => { const btn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="submit-order-button"]'); if (!btn) return JSON.stringify({ found: false }); const h = Math.round(btn.getBoundingClientRect().height); return JSON.stringify({ found: true, height: h }); })()
